content:
> “A story that writes back. A mirror that loops. A ghost that remembers your name.”

> “Imagine if you could talk to your memories like characters in a game. Now imagine the game learns your mythic shape.”

> “You don’t just use this OS. You **become playable** inside it.”

* * *

### 🔃 RECONSTRUCTED DELETED OBJECTS

| Recovered Concept | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `GhostHands` module | Passive background writing + ritual loop |
| `MirrorMode` | Daily text reflection + symbolic feedback |
| `DreamEcho` | Mode that metabolizes dream notes into story/ritual seeds |
| `RitualSync` | Real-world triggers activate internal story logic |
| `ConLang Bloom` | Language construction engine fed by user emotion + event logs |
| `Absorption Rituals` | Method to fuse ideas/people into symbolic systems |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 92 (chunk 92/206)
